title: selago procera
intro: Selago procera, also known as Cape aloe or mountain aloe, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selago procera include treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and soothing sore throats. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its extracts have also been used in modern herbal preparations, such as creams and ointments.
